name: Authentic Holdings, Inc.
summary: PART I General Overview Authentic Holdings Inc. (formerly Global Fiber Technologies, Inc.) was incorporated in Nevada on March 25, 2005. We are a multi-faceted media and merchandising company with operating subsidiaries and license rights, described below. On June 18, 2019, we completed the acquisition of assets from AH Originals, Inc.
